summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SynthOps IT Operations Portal. Backend APIs are highly functional with 97.4% success rate. Frontend has critical React rendering issues that cause crashes during CRUD operations, specifically when creating new entities like clients.

minor_bugs.issue: API expects string input for notes parameter but receives JSON object
minor_bugs.details: Expected string but got {"notes": "text"}, should accept JSON with notes field

critical_bugs.issue: React crashes with 'Objects are not valid as a React child' error after client creation
critical_bugs.details: Application becomes unusable after creating a client. Error suggests improper data rendering in React components.
critical_bugs.impact: Complete application crash, prevents further testing of CRUD operations

working_functionality: Basic page layouts and UI components

ui_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console

passed_tests: Dashboard loads and displays statistics correctly
All major backend CRUD operations (except maintenance completion)
Health check system generation and updates

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (basic functionality works, CRUD operations crash the app)

critical_fixes: Fix React rendering error in client creation flow - 'Objects are not valid as a React child'
Debug data handling after API responses that cause component crashes
Fix maintenance completion API parameter format (expects string, receives object)
medium_priority: Add proper accessibility attributes to Dialog components
Implement proper error boundaries to prevent complete app crashes
Test and validate all CRUD operations in frontend after fixing React errors
low_priority: Address console warnings for missing aria-describedby attributes
